promotion_guardrail: Proposal-side only. Do not promote to A2-1 kernel law from this batch without a later explicit selective promotion pass.

selection_basis.queue_reason: Selected as the next strong sims intake batch after the batch_v3 precursor-lineage reduction and as the next focused executable family before the already-deferred full_axis_suite sampler family.
selection_basis.parent_reason: The parent batch already isolates the exact seams needed for a second-pass reduction: single-lattice family identity, Axis0 proxy scope, absolute-vs-delta evidence shape, loop-orientation dominance, provenance/admission caution, and adjacent-family exclusion.
selection_basis.comparison_anchor_reason: The sims evidence-boundary batch was used for the nearest evidence-lane transport boundary, and the batch_v3 precursor-lineage batch was used for the nearest container-vs-evidence provenance separation pattern.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Deferred to the next bounded step because the parent batch explicitly preserves full_axis_suite as the adjacent but separate cross-axis sampler family.
Not selected because this thread prefers existing intake artifacts over raw-source rereads unless a parent batch proves insufficient.

raw_source_reread_reason: The parent engine32 intake batch plus the existing sims evidence-boundary and batch_v3 precursor-lineage reductions were sufficient to isolate the proxy fence, absolute-vs-delta evidence seam, dominant signal ordering, provenance caution, and adjacent-family separation.

candidate_items.name: ENGINE32_SINGLE_LATTICE_FAMILY_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves engine32 as one focused executable/result family rather than a composite or sampler surface.

candidate_items.name: AXIS0_PROXY_NO_AB_COUPLING_FENCE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the implementation-level proxy fence against overreading the family as AB-coupled Axis0 evidence.

candidate_items.name: ABSOLUTE_32_CELL_RESULT_OVER_DELTA_ONLY_EVIDENCE_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the core evidence-shape seam between the richer stored lattice and the compressed delta-only evidence block.

candidate_items.name: LOOP_ORIENTATION_SIGN_SPLIT_BEFORE_SEQUENCE_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the strongest numerical pattern in the family without flattening away the weaker sequence modulation.

candidate_items.name: CATALOG_PRESENT_SCRIPTLOCAL_EVIDENCE_NOT_TOPLEVEL_ADMISSION_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent batch's clearest provenance-confidence fence by separating visibility, local evidence emission, and repo-top-level admission.

candidate_items.name: FULL_AXIS_SAMPLER_ADJACENCY_SEPARATION_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the explicit family boundary between the focused engine32 attack lattice and the deferred full_axis_suite sampler.

quarantined_items.name: AXIS0_ATTACK_LABEL_AS_AB_COUPLED_AXIS0_EVIDENCE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent batch explicitly preserves a one-qubit proxy boundary with no AB coupling, so the label alone is not strong enough to promote this into AB-coupled Axis0 evidence.

quarantined_items.name: DELTA_SIDECAR_AS_COMPLETE_RESULT_SURFACE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent batch explicitly separates the compressed delta sidecar from the richer stored JSON lattice.

quarantined_items.name: SEQUENCE_ORDER_AS_PRIMARY_SIGNAL
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Sequence modulation exists, but the parent batch preserves a stronger loop-orientation sign split across the whole family.

quarantined_items.name: CATALOG_OR_SCRIPTLOCAL_EVIDENCE_AS_REPO_TOPLEVEL_ADMISSION
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Catalog visibility and script-local evidence emission do not by themselves yield current repo-top-level evidence-pack admission.

quarantined_items.name: ENGINE32_AND_FULL_AXIS_SAMPLER_MERGED_BY_ADJACENCY
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Shared vocabulary and raw-order adjacency are not enough to erase the structural family boundary between engine32 and full_axis_suite.

reasons_for_candidate_status: These candidates isolate the parent batch's strongest reusable packets: focused lattice identity, proxy scope, absolute-vs-delta evidence shape, dominant loop-orientation signal, provenance/admission caution, and adjacent-family separation.
They preserve engine32 as a bounded source-local family without letting naming, compressed evidence, or catalog visibility overstate what the current repo-top-level evidence record admits.
They remain small, contradiction-preserving, and proposal-side for later sims lineage synthesis.
reasons_for_quarantine_status: These items remain label overreads, evidence-shape overreads, signal-order overreads, admission overreads, or adjacency overreads rather than clean reusable A2-2 surfaces.
The parent batch is strong enough to preserve them as warnings, but not to promote them into current law.
notes: Operated from existing intake artifacts after prior required control-surface reads.
Used the sims evidence-boundary and batch_v3 precursor-lineage reductions as comparison anchors.
No raw core-doc reread was needed for this bounded engine32 delta-vs-absolute evidence reduction pass.
